item.title: Anthropic API version '2023-06-01' hardcoded in 3 files
item.intent: ANTHROPIC_API_VERSION has a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No literal version string appears in runtime code outside that file.
item.description: The Anthropic API version string '2023-06-01' is hardcoded as a literal in three separate files: src/secure/credentials/probes.ts:80 (anthropic-version header), src/evolve/integrate/validate.ts:53 (anthropic-version header), src/evolve/provider/lifecycle.ts:90 (anthropic-version header). If Anthropic updates their minimum supported API version, this must be updated in three places with no single source of truth. Same BUG-026 pattern (WhatsApp API version mismatch) — that fix added WHATSAPP_GRAPH_API_VERSION to defaults.ts. Steps: (1) add ANTHROPIC_API_VERSION = '2023-06-01' to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace the literal string in all three files; (3) run tests to confirm no regression. Scope: 4 files, ~6 lines changed. Pattern identical to BUG-026.
